# Javi's Fades — Salem, OR
> Javi's Fades is a barbershop in Salem, Oregon for fades, classic cuts, beard trims and hot-towel shaves. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 327 State St. Call (971) 218-5363. A downtown chair on State St, open seven days — fades and beard work, walk in or book.

## Services
- Haircuts & Fades
- Beard & Line-up
- Hot-Towel Shave
- Kids' Cuts
- Designs & Details

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (971) 218-5363 · Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–6pm · Sat 9–5 · Sun 9–4 · Languages: English, Español
